basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has officially announced the Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 with 01 opening. The detailed notification was published in July 2026 at https://www.nitc.ac.in/. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 35 years and hold a Postgraduate degree in Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Polymer Chemistry/ Materials Science (minimum CGPA 6.5) or a four-year graduate degree in Life Sciences/ Material Science (minimum CGPA 6.5) can now submit their applications via email up to 23 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification an

qualification.details: Essential Qualifications: | PG in Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Polymer Chemistry / Materials Science (with minimum CGPA of 6.5), OR Four Years Graduate Degree in any of the fields of Life Sciences / Material Science (with minimum CGPA of 6.5). | Desirable Qualifications: | Hands-on experience in animal cell culture, organ-on-chip device development, biomaterials & 3D bioprinting, hydrogel synthesis and material characterisation, nanomaterial synthesis, and nanofabrication techniques.

how_to_apply: Fill the registration form (available with the advertisement).
Prepare a single PDF containing: Duly filled application form Most recent CV Soft copies of mark sheets and certificates
Soft copies of mark sheets and certificates
Email the PDF to [email protected] with a copy to [email protected].
Subject Line: “Application for ICMR - Project Technical Support - III”
Shortlisted candidates will be notified by email for the offline interview.
important_instructions: The position is purely on contract basis. Applicants already employed must submit a No Objection Certificate at the time of interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right to relax qualifications for exceptional candidates. Candidates are responsible for the authenticity of all submitted documents.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Technical Support Overview 2026

rows.national_institute_of_technology_calicut: Development of a 4D Bioprinted Lung-on-a-Chip Model with Plant Derived Bioinks for Studying Micro/Nanoplastic Inhalation Toxicity Using Fluorescent Carbon Dot Tracers
One Year (extendable based on performance and funding)

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Technical Support Important Dates 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualifications: PG in Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Polymer Chemistry / Materials Science (with minimum CGPA of 6.5), OR Four Years Graduate Degree in any of the fields of Life Sciences / Material Science (with minimum CGPA of 6.5). Desirable Qualifications: Hands-on experience in animal cell culture, organ-on-chip device development, biomaterials & 3D bioprinting, hydrogel synthesis and material characterisation, nanomaterial synthesis, and nanofabrication techniques.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Calicut Project Technical Support III 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 23 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy under the ICMR-funded project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Technical Support III at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: Consolidated pay is Rs. 28,000/- + 20% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for NIT Calicut ICMR Project Technical Support?
faq.answer: PG in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Polymer Chemistry/Materials Science or Four-year Graduate Degree in Life Sciences/Material Science (min CGPA 6.5).

faq.question: Q5. When is the interview for NIT Calicut Project Technical Support 2026?
faq.answer: The offline interview is scheduled on 27 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Calicut Bioscience Project Technical Support?
faq.answer: Send the filled form, CV, and documents as a single PDF to [email protected] with proper subject line.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for NIT Calicut Project Position?
faq.answer: The age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience mandatory for NIT Calicut Project Technical Support III?
faq.answer: Experience in cell culture, 3D bioprinting, organ-on-chip, etc., is desirable.

faq.question: Q9. Is the position permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The engagement is purely contractual for one year (extendable).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form for NIT Calicut ICMR Project 2026?
faq.answer: The registration form is available with the official advertisement on the NIT Calicut website.
